results.change_condition: once encryption is enabled in the example exchange
results.related_state_or_step: record layer after encryption is enabled

results.comment: RFC 9146 要求非零 CID 协商后、加密启用后用 CID-enhanced record format 和 tls12_cid 发送。BoringSSL DTLS 1.2 写路径仍写普通 DTLSPlaintext header，没有 CID 字段或 tls12_cid。

results.change_condition: when determining whether a received datagram can trigger a peer address change
results.change_action: must be newer than the newest datagram received
results.old_value: epoch of the newest datagram received
results.new_value: a greater/newer epoch in the received datagram
results.input_evidence: The received datagram is "newer" (in terms of both epoch and sequence number) than the newest datagram received.
results.comment: RFC 9146 对 CID 记录源地址变化要求验证后且 epoch/sequence 更新。BoringSSL 有 replay bitmap，但没有 CID 到连接查找和 peer address update 状态机，因此没有该地址更新门控。
results.comparison_summary: 要求 -> CID 记录可触发受限 peer address update；标准含义 -> 必须同时满足认证、新 epoch/sequence、地址可达策略；代码行为 -> 只做记录重放窗口，不处理 CID 源地址迁移；结论 -> 不满足。

results.change_condition: MAC/additional_data construction for records carrying a CID
results.change_action: used as tls12_cid in the constructed input
results.input_evidence: seq_num_placeholder + tls12_cid + cid_length + tls12_cid + DTLSCiphertext.version + epoch + sequence_number + cid + length_of_DTLSInnerPlaintext;
results.comment: RFC 9146 MAC/AAD 构造以 tls12_cid、cid_length、CID 和内部长度作为输入。BoringSSL AEAD Open/SealScatter 只使用 record.header 作为 AAD，没有 CID AAD 构造。
results.comparison_summary: 要求 -> CID 记录使用 modified MAC/AAD；标准含义 -> tls12_cid 在 AAD 中出现并隔离非 CID MAC 输入；代码行为 -> additional data 是解析/写出的 record.header；结论 -> 不满足。

results.change_condition: when determining whether a received datagram can trigger a peer address change
results.change_action: must be newer than the newest datagram received
results.old_value: sequence number of the newest datagram received
results.new_value: a greater/newer sequence number in the received datagram
results.input_evidence: The received datagram is "newer" (in terms of both epoch and sequence number) than the newest datagram received.

results.change_condition: for applicability of this content type
results.change_action: must be present only for DTLS 1.2
results.input_evidence: The tls12_cid content type is only applicable to DTLS 1.2.

results.comparison_summary: 要求 -> tls12_cid(25) 仅用于 DTLS 1.2；标准含义 -> 不能误用于 TLS 或 DTLS 1.3；代码行为 -> 无 tls12_cid，DTLS 1.3 CID bit return false；结论 -> 不满足该内容类型支持。

phase2_verification.code_check: 已复核证据路径：boringssl-main/ssl/dtls_record.cc:170; boringssl-main/ssl/dtls_record.cc:171; boringssl-main/ssl/dtls_record.cc:172; boringssl-main/ssl/dtls_record.cc:173; boringssl-main/ssl/dtls_record.cc:427; boringssl-main/ssl/dtls_record.cc:431; boringssl-main/ssl/dtls_record.cc:533; boringssl-main/ssl/dtls_record.cc:540; boringssl-main/ssl/dtls_record.cc:548; boringssl-main/ssl/dtls_record.cc:556; boringssl-main/ssl/dtls_record.cc:558。BoringSSL 主库没有 connection_id(54) 扩展状态、tls12_cid(25) 内容类型、CID 字段解析/发送或 RFC 9146 CID AAD 构造。

phase2_verification.decision_reason: RFC 9146 分配 tls12_cid(25)，且仅适用于 DTLS 1.2。BoringSSL 没有 tls12_cid content type；DTLS 1.3 的 CID bit 反而被显式拒绝。

results.change_condition: may appear after the type field in cleartext
results.change_action: set to an arbitrary-length run of zero-valued bytes
results.input_evidence: zeros:  An arbitrary-length run of zero-valued bytes may appear in the cleartext after the type field.
results.comment: BoringSSL DTLS 1.3 路径支持 encrypted inner type 后的零填充剥离，但 RFC 9146 要求的是 DTLS 1.2 CID 的 DTLSInnerPlaintext padding；该路径不存在。
results.comparison_summary: 要求 -> DTLSInnerPlaintext.real_type 后可有 zero-valued padding；标准含义 -> CID 记录内部明文可填充；代码行为 -> 仅 DTLS 1.3 has_padding 路径处理 trailing zeros；结论 -> 部分满足。
results.category: DTLS 1.3 padding only, no RFC 9146 DTLS 1.2 CID padding

results.category: DTLS 1.3 padding only, no RFC 9146 DTLS 1.2 CID padding
